title: 日本ダービーの後に・慙愧

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Satono Diamond has become a Derby champion.
Even so, she regrets spending the race distracted
by her shoes, even though there was nothing
wrong with them.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In her mind, that shows that she let the jinx get
the better of her, which she can't forgive herself
for.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She vows to hone her skills and overcome her jinx
by winning the Kikuka Sho.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We stop be a cafe on our way back, where we
hear overhear a passionate conversation. It seems
that Kitasan Black's fans relate to her
perseverance.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Feeling as though Kitasan Black is leaving her
behind, Satono Diamond thinks she needs to
become worthy of being her rival.
